_mAll.desc: Margin on all sides of element. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_mTop.desc: Margin at top of element. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_mLeft.desc: Margin at left side of element. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_mRight.desc: Margin at right of element. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_mBottom.desc: Margin at bottom of element. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.
